Shield of Ymir

Triggers: Once in a while

Frost Armor
The unit is surrounded by an ice shield for 7 sec. When a unit attacks the unit with the ice shield, they have their attack speed reduced by 20% (Up to 3 effects), cooldown time of their weapon abilities and artifact abilities is increased by 1 sec. Once in a while, when the unit with the ice shield receives 5 attacks, they deal 150000 magic damage to a random enemy and scare them for 2 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
